name: td
description: Thomas Digital private shadcn registry. Channel-based versioning per ADR-02. Breaking changes ship under a new channel (@td-v2, @td-v3); existing channels are immutable once frozen.

v1.description: Initial channel. Components live under registry/v1/. Becomes frozen on first @td-v2 release.

v2.description: Next breaking-change channel. Empty placeholder; populated only when a v1 component requires a breaking change.
